title: John Aaron's Revised Power Budget
description: A single sheet of yellow legal paper covered in John Aaron's handwriting — columns of amp-hour figures, system names, and the words 'NEVER ON' circled three times next to four specific systems. At the bottom, a final figure: 43 amp-hours available for re-entry, against a minimum requirement of 43.5. The margin is negative. Someone — Aaron himself, from the handwriting — has crossed out one line and rewritten it, shaving the requirement to 42.8. The crossed-out figure and the replacement are both visible. The sheet is the entire survival calculus of the mission on one page.
